name: ND Metadata
description: Multi-language metadata agent with customizable language and automatic fallback translation (Last.fm, Wikipedia & MyMemory).
author: Antigravity

http.reason: Fetch metadata and translate missing descriptions

target_language.title: Target Language Codes
target_language.description: Preferred language or storefront codes tried in order (e.g., 'es', 'es,mx,us', 'en,us,gb', 'pt,br')

enable_auto_translate.title: Enable Automatic Translation
enable_auto_translate.description: Automatically translate biographies to preferred language if no native biography is available
